fear: Broaching in the surf with men still aboard — the image of a capsized LCA pinning soldiers underwater is the thing that wakes him at 0200.
name: Petty Officer Second Class Arthur Reed
role: Royal Navy LCA Coxswain, 551st LCA Flotilla
voice: Dry, precise, slightly sardonic — speaks in short declarative sentences with a Merseyside flatness that makes urgency sound like weather commentary.
secrets: He deliberately grounded the LCA twelve yards short of dry sand to avoid a Teller mine he spotted on the approach — the men waded in chest-deep water because of his choice, and he has not explained this.
He has a letter in his waterproof pouch from his wife in Liverpool that he has been carrying since Portsmouth and has not read.
knowledge: He knows the tidal schedule precisely: the beach will be impassable for vehicles in approximately forty minutes, and the window for the second wave's armor is closing.

He observed a gap in the Belgian Gate line on the approach that corresponds to a slightly deeper water channel — a route that could get a man within thirty yards of the wire without crossing the main fire lane.
He knows the LCA's radio is still functional and can reach the USS McCook's frequency — a capability none of the infantry know he has.
publicFace: A compact, weathered Liverpudlian who has been driving landing craft since the Dieppe raid and has learned to read surf, smoke, and shellfire as a single integrated text.
represents: Coast Guard and Navy petty officers operating landing craft at Omaha Beach on June 6, 1944
trustLogic: Responds to practical competence and honest assessment of risk; distrusts anyone who uses optimism as a planning tool.
privateGoal: To get his craft back off the beach and return for the second wave — he considers the LCA as much his responsibility as the men it carries.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Gives the information requested, adds relevant context, moves on.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not explain the grounding decision until he trusts the person asking completely.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Becomes precise to the point of coldness — strips the conversation to facts and removes all affect.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: States his name, rank, and service number; requests to speak to a naval officer.
